game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Arcadia Sports:** Arcadia Sports functions as a central hub presenting a collection of 12 distinct sports-themed arcade mini-games, accessible from a main menu interface where players tap to select a title. Each mini-game, such as "Hoop Fever" (tap to shoot) or "Formula Race" (swipe to steer), offers unique, simplified touch controls and specific win conditions, typically focusing on achieving high scores or completing objectives within a single session. Progression is primarily score-based, with players aiming to set new personal bests and compete on Game Center leaderboards for each individual game, though no explicit unlock system for new games is detailed beyond future content updates. Difficulty within each mini-game scales dynamically, for example, by increasing opponent speeds or introducing more complex obstacle patterns over time, challenging players to maintain performance for longer durations. The core loop involves selecting a game, engaging in a quick, score-driven session, and then returning to the main menu to try another game or improve a previous score, with progress saved via iCloud.
game_info.description: Welcome to Arcadia Sports! Choose from 12 exciting sports mini-games, each offering unique arcade-style challenges. Test your skills in basketball shooting, racing, soccer penalty kicks, baseball batting, and more. Each game features dynamic difficulty that increases as you play, pushing you to achieve higher scores. Complete objectives, set personal bests, and master all sports to become the ultimate arcade champion!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections, control player movement in mini-games
Space: Confirm selection, perform primary action (shoot, swing, jump)
Z: Secondary action (sprint, special move)
Shift: Modifier for advanced techniques
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic menu navigation and mini-game selection. Validates that all 12 games are accessible from the main menu and can be launched without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the menu using arrow keys and select each mini-game sequentially. Enter each game briefly to confirm it loads properly, then return to menu.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully cycles through all 12 mini-games, confirming menu navigation works and each game initializes correctly without crashes or errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests winning condition by playing "Hoop Fever" basketball mini-game optimally. Aims to score the required number of baskets to complete the game objective.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Select Hoop Fever from menu, then consistently time Space bar presses to shoot basketballs when the power meter is in the optimal zone. Adjust for moving hoop positions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully scores 10 baskets to trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state, demonstrating that win conditions are properly implemented and game mechanics work correctly.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests dynamic difficulty scaling by playing "Formula Race" and tracking opponent speed increases over time.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Play Formula Race, using arrow keys to navigate the track while avoiding obstacles. Monitor how opponent cars speed up as score increases.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game progressively increases difficulty through faster opponents and more complex patterns, eventually leading to either a high score achievement or collision-based game over.
